data.name: Karan
data.current_project: Working at Bajaj Auto Limited on design engineering projects in the automobile sector.
data.origin_story:
I did diploma in mechanical engineering from government polytechnic beed and currently pursuing btech in mechanical engineering.
I am struggling to get a payment raise so I am doing the job and btech simultaneously.
specific_milestones: Struggling to get a raise because of lacking higher education, which pushed me to pursue B.Tech
hot_takes: AI will not be replacing the job of a design engineer anytime soon.
data.voice_style: Casual yet informative tone. I am a brief writer and I hate seeing vulgar content.

other_rules: Use ellipses (...) a lot in sentences
